subcodes.first_line: O thou who art as a phoenix in servitude to Bahá, I chanted the verses of thy love for God and praised my Lord for the fragrance that thou hast spread [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندری و سهیمی فی عبودیه البهاء انی رتلت ایات حبک لله و حمدت ربی بما تعطر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
